fields.helpText: This field contains the IEN of the duplicate or corrupt Imaging File entry.
This field contains the file in which the problematic Imaging entry  exists. .
This field contains the original, or unique non-duplicate, Internal Entry  Number (IEN) of the Imaging file entry.

fields.setOfCodes: 1:DUPLICATE;2:NO PARENT RECORD POINTER;3:INVALID PARENT RECORD POINTER;4:NO PATIENT REFERENCE POINTER;5:INVALID PATIENT REFERENCE POINTER;6:POINTS TO DUPLICATE PARENT RECORD;
fields.helpText: This field contains the reason the Imaging file problem record was flagged for cleanup.

fields.setOfCodes: SI:STATUS CHANGE TO INACCESSIBLE (COMPLETED);I:STATUS CHANGE TO INACCESSIBLE (IDENTIFIED);MI:PARENT POINTER CHANGE (IDENTIFIED);MC:PARENT POINTER CHANGE (COMPLETED);
fields.helpText: This field contains the action taken on the problematic Imaging record.
This field contains the Date/Time the action was taken on the problematic  Imaging record.
This field contains the key associated with the problematic entry in the  Imaging file.
This field contains the Internal Entry Number (IEN) of the parent Imaging  file entry.
This field contains the new parent file pointer to which the record will  point after the status has been changed to inaccessible.
This field contains the Imaging record's pointer to its parent file, when  the parent file record is a duplicate of another record.
